evidence: Robin Williams touched me deeply... He was a master at both comedies or drama.
Good suspense, thriller movie, slow pace but still good.
The story of a lonely man going thru a very hard time... trying to find out whom he really was.
It is one of those films that starts from the end and then they go back in time as to how they got there.
Very slow pace, but will kill an hour an half of your time.
Good suspense, thriller movie, slow pace but still good.
Great acting all around, great script also based on a truth story I believe.
I WAS very disappointed with this film... bad horrific streaming conditions.
Errol Flynn can't go wrong with me, a big fan of his movies since I was a kid.
Richard Dreyfuss has always been and continues to be one of my favorite actors.
The story takes Melissa and her kid... you will feel sad at times and you will laugh at times.
The dancing choreography was great on its own and speaks for itself.
The story and specially the ending will leave you feeling very satisfied about having watched this movie.
It might just do the same to you, when you watch it.

summary: The user enjoys a mix of drama, comedy, and thriller genres, with a strong preference for high-quality production and emotional resonance. They tend to favor slower-paced narratives that evoke deep feelings, while also showing some brand loyalty to specific actors like Errol Flynn and Richard Dreyfuss.
